title: First Encounter (1)
overview: Children unwittingly reopen an ancient battle between Autobots and Decepticons.

title: Metamorphosis (2)
overview: Alex, Rad and Carlos find the cargo hold of the Exodus underground and are adopted by three minicons.

title: Base (3)
overview: Alexis, Rad and Carlos introduce themselves to Optimus Prime, Hot Rod and First Aid.

title: Comrade
overview: The children join the Autobot team and head out on their first mission to find a newly waking minicon.

title: Soldier
overview: Autobots discover a MiniCon at the South Pole.

title: Jungle
overview: The newest minicon activates in the middle of a forest: both sides fight for it.

title: Carnival
overview: Rad and Carlos smuggle their minicons out of the base to visit the town's carnival.

title: Palace
overview: In an ancient palace deep beneath the Sahara another minicon is waking. Who will reach it first?

title: Confrontation
overview: The Decepticons capture all the children to use as hostages in exchange for the Autobots's minicons.

title: Underground
overview: The latest minicon re-activates in the subway system of a large city.

title: Ruin
overview: From an ancient submerged city a beautiful girl issues a warning about the devastating power.

title: Prehistory
overview: The children learn more about the history of the minicons and the war.

title: Swoop
overview: The Decepticons gain access to the Autobot base and attempt to take the other two minicons.

title: Overmatch
overview: Hot Shot proves himself very skilled with the Star Sabre.

title: Gale
overview: A new minicon activates inside a highway tunnel.

title: Credulous
overview: Grabbing onto Megatron at the end of a battle, Hot Shot and Sideways are transported to the moon.

title: Conspiracy
overview: Decepticons mutiny while searching for MiniCons in a jungle.

title: Trust
overview: Autobots and Decepticons face off amongst snowy mountains in the battle for the latest minicon.

title: Vacation
overview: A weekend's camping trip to the valley below the dam goes wrong when a violent storm moves in.

title: Reinforcement
overview: Autobot Blurr joins the team, but proves himself not much of a team player.

title: Decisive Battle
overview: Megatron plots to destroy the Autobots once and for all.

title: Vow
overview: Megatron uses the Minicons to lure the Autobots into a trap.

title: Rebellion
overview: Starscream challenges Megatron for control of the Decepitcons.

title: Chase
overview: Trapped with Sideways, Alexis, Rad, Carlos and their minicons become aware of a massive evil entity.

title: Tactician
overview: A new transformer enters the solar system.

title: Link Up
overview: With Optimus damaged and temporarily out of commission, the newly-arrived Jetfire takes command.

title: Detection
overview: On the moon, Thrust continues his plotting with Megatron.

title: Awakening
overview: The massive Tidalwave joins the Decepticons, but is, seemingly, defeated in battle by Hot Shot and Blurr.

title: Desperate
overview: The kids try to gather the three Requiem Blaster minicons together.

title: Runaway
overview: The minicons want to be in charge of their own destinies, so the kids sneak the new team out of the base.

title: Past (1)
overview: Enthusiastic young Sideswipe joins the team and Optimus tasks Hot Shot with training him.

title: Past (2)
overview: Desperate to make amends to his old friend, Hot Shot allows Wheeljack to shoot him, but this isn't enough.

title: Sacrifice
overview: Megatron sacrifices Starscream, leaving him to face the Autobots alone.

title: Regeneration
overview: Hearing Megatron say he is nothing more than disposable cannon fodder, Starscream defects with the Star Sabre.

title: Rescue
overview: With Starscream's help, the Autobots infiltrate the Decepticon moon base.

title: Mars
overview: Alexis tracks a minicon in the vicinity of Mars.

title: Crack
overview: Starscream trusts Thrust and returns to the moon base.

title: Threaten
overview: Sabre, Shield and Blaster together create the Hydra Cannon.

title: Crisis
overview: Optimus and Jetfire attack the ship, but can't stop the Hydra Cannon being deployed.

title: Remorse
overview: Hot Shot insists they should take vengeance on the Decepticons.

title: Depart
overview: With the Autobot ship ready to leave, Hot Shot refuses to let the children accompany them.

title: Miracle
overview: While the Axalon chases the Decepticon ship, hundreds of minicons appear.

title: Puppet
overview: Hot Shot and Red Alert are sucked through a wormhole.

title: Uprising
overview: The 'Bots reach Cybertron to find Megatron (now calling himself Galvatron) already winning the war.

title: Dash
overview: While the battle continues, Hot Shot goes to Cybertron to try to convince Galvatron of the impending danger.

title: Drift
overview: Thrust flees into the depths of Cybertron, pursued by Hot Shot and Wheeljack - and, separately, Starscream.

title: Portent
overview: Thrust joins Sideways by passing through a portal underground.

title: Cramp
overview: Starscream prepares to do whatever it takes to convince Galvatron the threat of Unicron is real.

title: Alliance
overview: As Unicron begins to awaken, Optimus and Galvatron decide to forgo their battle.

title: Union (1)
overview: The only way to defeat Unicron is to wake the minicons inside him and attack from within as well as without.

title: Origin (2)
overview: The purpose and meaning behind the endless war is revealed.

title: Mortal Combat (3)
overview: Thinking Unicron is defeated, Galvatron and Optimus Prime resume their battle.
